items.title: Implement Spend Caps for Overspenders
items.action: Set and monitor monthly AI token usage limits for top 7 overspenders to control budget risk.
items.expected_effect: Reduce AI spend waste by 20%, saving approximately $4,900 monthly.

items.title: Quality Risk Mitigation for Maxime Dubois
items.action: Perform detailed quality review and provide targeted coaching to improve output quality.
items.expected_effect: Achieve 15% reduction in bugs related to this user, lowering defect costs.

items.title: Increase AI Adoption in Low Usage Employees
items.action: Launch training programs and incentives to boost AI token utilization among low adoption employees.
items.expected_effect: Drive 10% productivity lift in this segment, increasing overall efficiency.

items.title: Scale High ROI User Best Practices
items.action: Document and disseminate effective AI usage patterns from top performers to all teams.
items.expected_effect: Improve company-wide productivity by 5%, enhancing ROI on AI spend.
